purpose: Negative-control calibration: the deliberately incomplete starter must build but fail the core journey gates.

failedChecks.title: [F02A|6][GATE] filtering controls cards, URL state and direct loading
[F02B|2] browser back and forward restore filter state
[F03|4][GATE] a keyboard-operable service button reveals supplied detail
[F04|4][GATE] dialog traps focus, closes with Escape and returns focus
[F05|4][GATE] the native-select form has errors and deterministic success
[R02|5] long copy is not clamped or clipped and missing media has a fallback
[R04|5] mobile navigation is present and keyboard usable
[A02|4][GATE] whole page remains accessible while the modal is open
